description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:17.11.0-ce-git and the Docker-in-Docker service registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:17.11.0-ce-dind (alias docker) for all jobs. Define a single build stage and a hidden .build-template job that is excluded from generic branch pipelines, sets variables CITBX_JOB_RUN_FILE_NAME=build.sh, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, and runs the script tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh. Add a build-dind job in the build stage that inherits the template, runs only on branches matching the regex ^.*-dind$, and executes tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh. Add a build-git job in the build stage that inherits the template, runs only on branches matching the regex ^.*-git$, and also executes tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh.
